subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath made one of the Hands of His Cause! Due to the intensity of the surging waves of this vast ocean, writing is difficult and arduous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من جعله الله من ایادی امره از شدت حرکت امواج محیط تحریر مشکل و عسیر و این
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @Hands of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
